caption: A recorded session of the "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" takes place in a wood-paneled room. On-screen text at the bottom indicates the date is "April 12, 2019" and the topic is "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage," accompanied by an "ORCA" logo. In the early frames, a man with a beard in a dark suit and tie speaks while gesturing with his hands, seated next to a man in glasses and a suit. A woman with blonde hair is partially visible to the left. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts to show other participants. A man in a dark suit and tie listens while another man in a grey sweater sits at a desk. A woman with brown hair watches the proceedings. In the final frame, a man in a dark blazer is seen from behind, standing and facing the committee.
